heroHeadline: AI Delivers Measurable Health and Science Impact: Alzheimer's Drug Compounds, Cancer Diagnostics, and 74% EU Health AI Adoption
heroSubtitle: From a Nature-published AI platform identifying blood-brain barrier-permeable Alzheimer's compounds to a multimodal cancer AI achieving 0.954 AUC across 3,940 patients — and WHO documenting AI diagnostics in 74% of EU health systems — April 2026 shows artificial intelligence delivering real outcomes across healthcare, education, and disaster response globally.
footerNote: Data sourced from peer-reviewed journals (Nature, Science, The Lancet, npj Digital Medicine), UN agencies (WHO, FAO, WFP, UNESCO, ITU), and major technology research outlets. Impact claims require independent validation; contested figures are marked.
